title: The :has() Selector
description: Use the :has() relational pseudo-class to style parent elements based on their children's state
html: Invalid email address

validationRules.message: Form groups with errors should have a red left border
Form groups with errors should have a light red background
Form groups with textarea should have min-height: 120px

hints.text: :has() is the 'parent selector' - it lets you select an element based on what it contains. Think: 'does this parent have a child that matches?'
Use '.form-group:has(.error)' to target groups containing an error span. Use '.form-group:has(textarea)' for textarea groups.
